title: nasturtium bipinnatum
intro: Nasturtium bipinnatum is a species of flowering plant in the cress family (Brassicaceae), also known as Indian cress or tall watercress. The medicinal properties of Nasturtium bipinnatum include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic agent, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Nasturtium bipinnatum include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. Nasturtium bipinnatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat colds, sore throats, and skin conditions.
